case_title: ABURTO, MARIA vs. RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABURTO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-03-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-04-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-16-1996
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABURTO, MARIA SERVED SEP-18-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-03-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO ENTER DEFAULT. CONTINUED FROM 1/3/97. HEARING SET FOR JAN-23-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-23-1997, CONTINUED TO MAR-10-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DEFAULT OF OSC WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-10-1997, CONTINUED TO APR-09-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABURTO, MARIA UNSERVED ON DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABURTO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-09-1997, CONTINUED TO MAY-23-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-23-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE OSC ON PLTF'S ATTY WHY DEFAULT JUDGMENT HAS NOT BEEN ENTERED. HEARING SET FOR JUL-02-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
TRIAL DELAY REDUCTN DPT. ORDER SHOW CAUSE/CONT'D STATUS CONF
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $115.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES
OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-02-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ROBERT J. JAFFE. HEARING SET FOR AUG-07-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION DEPT. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE/CONTINUED STATUS CONFERENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-07-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ROBERT J JAFFE. HEARING SET FOR SEP-03-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
NOTICE TO TDR RE LIST OF DOCUMENTS TRANSMITTED TO CLERK FILED BY PLTF'S ATTY.
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS RODRIQUEZ, ANDRES TO BE RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $115.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABURTO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES
DECLARATION OF SHIRLEY TERRY FILED
AMENDMENT TO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABURTO, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ANDRES $3,715.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,830.50
OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-03-1997, OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 9-2-97.
